name: create_formatted_excel_workbook_from_json
desc: Create a formatted Excel workbook (.xlsx) from structured JSON.

parameters.name: content_json
parameters.description: JSON object: { title?, sheets: [{ name, headers: [], rows: [[]], autoFilter?, freezeHeader? }] }

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: Output .xlsx file path. If omitted, writes to MEPBridge/exports/
